data.p2_kw_year_eur: EUR cost of KW in P2 per year

formulas.title: Billing formulas
formulas.description:
Jinja2 expressions evaluated per hour.

**Hourly variables**: `kwh` (consumption), `surplus_kwh` (exported), `kwh_eur` (€/kWh for the period or PVPC), `surplus_kwh_eur` (surplus €/kWh for the period), `p1_kw`, `p2_kw`.

**Configured prices**: `p1_kwh_eur`, `p2_kwh_eur`, `p3_kwh_eur`, `surplus_p1_kwh_eur`, `p1_kw_year_eur`, `p2_kw_year_eur`, `meter_month_eur`, `market_kw_year_eur`, `electricity_tax`, `iva_tax`.

**Suggested (flat tariff / non-PVPC)**:
- Energy: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * kwh_eur * kwh`
- Power: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * p1_kw_year_eur + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24`
- Others: `iva_tax * meter_month_eur / 30 / 24`
- Surplus: `surplus_kwh * surplus_kwh_eur`

**Suggested (PVPC)**:
- Energy: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * kwh_eur * kwh`
- Power: `electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * (p1_kw_year_eur + market_kw_year_eur) + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24`
- Others: `iva_tax * meter_month_eur / 30 / 24`
- Surplus: `surplus_kwh * kwh_eur`

data_description.power_formula: Suggested: electricity_tax * iva_tax * (p1_kw * p1_kw_year_eur + p2_kw * p2_kw_year_eur) / 365 / 24
data_description.surplus_formula: Suggested: surplus_kwh * surplus_kwh_eur  (no tax — simplified compensation)

confirm.title: Simulation (with taxes)
confirm.description:
**{month}** — {delta_h} hours

Estimated breakdown (taxes included):
- Contracted power: **{power_term} €**
- Imported energy: **{energy_term} €**
- Others (meter, social bonus): **{others_term} €**
- Surplus compensation: **−{surplus_term} €**
- Self-consumption savings ☀: **{savings_term} €**

**Estimated total bill: {value_eur} €**
